heading: Establishment and maintenance of counseling services
label: 4707 Establishment and maintenance of counseling services

children.heading: Counseling services abroad
children.label: a Counseling services abroad
children.text: For the purpose of assisting foreign students in choosing fields of study, selecting appropriate institutions of higher education, and preparing for their stay in the United States, the President may make suitable arrangements for counseling and orientation services abroad.

children.heading: Counseling services in the United States
children.label: b Counseling services in the United States
children.text: For the purposes of assisting foreign students in making the best use of their opportunities while attending United States institutions of higher education, and assisting such students in directing their talents and initiative into channels which will make them more effective leaders upon return to their native lands, the President may make suitable arrangements (by contract or otherwise) for the establishment and maintenance of adequate counseling services at United States institutions of higher education which are attended by foreign students.
